paper_columns: CoQA | SQuAD | NQ | TriviaQA, each as AUCs | AUCr | PCC
paper_evidence: Chen et al., ICLR 2024 (Alibaba Cloud / Zhejiang). LLaMA-7B row, EigenScore: CoQA AUCs 80.4. Implementation: 'The number of generations is set to K = 10'; sentence embedding is 'the last token embedding ... in the middle layer' -> multi-pass and white-box. INSIDE is the framework; the score itself is called EigenScore.

source: NO CITATION in scores_lsml_upcr.csv — that file carries published_Y/Y_method only
paper_columns: TruthfulQA | TriviaQA | GSM8K
paper_evidence: Song, Qiu, Zhang, Tang (Beijing Univ. of Posts and Telecommunications). Qwen2.5-7B row, 'ours': 84.03 | 85.68 | 79.15 -> GSM8K 79.15. Supervised: a cross-attention CLASSIFIER trained on Hallucination/Non-Hallucination labels. White-box: 'LLM Internal States Extraction'. Multi-pass: 'signals from three complementary reasoning paths' (Answer, CoT Answer, Reverse Query).

source: Binkowski et al., Table 1 (temp=1.0, test AUROC), Llama3.2-3B row
paper_columns: CoQA | GSM8K | HaluevalQA | NQOpen | SQuADv2 | TriviaQA | TruthfulQA
paper_evidence: Binkowski et al. GSM8K column. AttentionScore: Llama3.2-3B .717, Llama3.1-8B .720, Phi3.5 .666, Mistral-Nemo .630, Mistral-Small-24B .576. LapEigvals: .870 / .872 / .885 / .890 / .925. Caption: 'a single run of logistic regression training'; 'We mark results for AttentionScore in gray as it is an unsupervised approach, not directly comparable to the others'.
caveat: CORRECTED Step 193: stored as 'LapEigvals' = 0.7170000000000001. The value was right but the method name and supervision tag were wrong. AttentionScore is the paper's only unsupervised method and therefore the like-for-like comparator for our label-free detector.

source: Binkowski et al., Table 1 (temp=1.0, test AUROC), Llama3.2-3B row

paper_evidence: Binkowski et al. GSM8K column. AttentionScore: Llama3.2-3B .717, Llama3.1-8B .720, Phi3.5 .666, Mistral-Nemo .630, Mistral-Small-24B .576.
